overview: Synopsis: ELSA-2025-22395 can now be patched using Ksplice
full_text:
Synopsis: ELSA-2025-22395 can now be patched using Ksplice
CVEs: CVE-2025-22068 CVE-2025-38724 CVE-2025-39973

Users with Oracle Linux Premier Support can now use Ksplice to patch
against the latest Oracle Linux Security Advisory, ELSA-2025-22395.
More information about this errata can be found at
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-22395.html

INSTALLING THE UPDATES

We recommend that all users of Ksplice Uptrack running RHCK 10 install
these updates.

On systems that have "autoinstall = yes" in /etc/uptrack/uptrack.conf,
these updates will be installed automatically and you do not need to
take any action.

Alternatively, you can install these updates by running:

# /usr/sbin/uptrack-upgrade -y


DESCRIPTION

* CVE-2025-22068: Use-after-free in Userspace block driver.

* CVE-2025-38724: Use-after-free in NFSv4 server driver.

* CVE-2025-39973: Out-of-bounds memory access in Intel(R) Ethernet Controller XL710 Family driver.

SUPPORT

Ksplice support is available at ksplice-support_ww at oracle.com.
